summary: Signing module, provider module, and supporting infrastructure fully documented. 23 XML doc comments added across 12 files, 3 architecture docs updated, CHANGELOG written, 3 consistency fixes applied.

changes.description: Added property docs for Name, PublicKey, PrivateKey, IsDefault, IsArchived, Created
Added method and parameter docs for Sign and Verify
Added method docs for all 9 interface methods
Added method docs for GenerateKeyPair, Sign, Verify
Added docs for 5 internal helpers: LoadAsync, LoadAllAsync, SaveAsync, RemoveAsync, Deserialize
Added parameter docs for Path and Name
Added parameter docs for Name and Type
Added parameter docs for Name and Type

Added signing module section (pipeline, verification, contracts, settings, actions, error keys) and provider module section (registry design, type mapping, actions, error keys). Fixed identity.getAll → identity.list.
Added Signing Module Architecture section. Updated Engine.Providers from single-provider to named multi-provider API with full interface hierarchy.
Fixed identity file tree (getAll→list, removed KeyGenerator), added crypto/signing/provider folder trees
CHANGELOG with 7 Added and 3 Changed entries

findings.issue: No PLang .goal examples for signing module
findings.detail: Tester owns PLang examples. Builder prompt not yet updated for signing steps.

findings.issue: No PLang .goal examples for provider module
findings.detail: Same as above — deferred until builder supports provider steps.
